violations.text: The ceiling tiles and light fixtures were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The plumbing in the rest room and the main floor draining were observed not operational. Sewage was observed in immediate area around floor drain including entrance of walk in cooler and in restroom. Through interview with staff, it was determined that all drains are causing back up. Establishment must have drainage in working order and in proper repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The back up from the drain was observed in the bathroom, and in back room by drain including the entrance of the walk in cooler. Establishment must clean and sanitize all floors in facility. Flooding document provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
